response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is a senior-level developer with no indication of entry-level suitability, lacks proficiency in German (only 'basic'), and has minimal Java experience despite the role requiring Java proficiency and insurance-sector agile projects — making them overqualified and misaligned with core requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong contributions to open-source and community education (workshops, talks)
Demonstrated agile practices and DevOps infrastructure expertise
concerns: Only basic German proficiency — fails key language requirement
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with minimal Java exposure
Senior-level background makes them overqualified and likely unsuitable for entry-level role
